title: Cable Ties, 100PCS White Plastic Cable Ties 450mm×4.8mm, Heavy Duty Strong Nylon Premium Self Locking 17.72 inch/45cm, Extra Long Zip Tie Wraps for Tidy Wires Workshop Home & Garden
features: 【Size & Quantity】 Nylon Cable Ties, 17.72 inches long , 0.19 inches wide, 100pieces per pack, Tensile Strength: 22kg

【High Quality Material】 Our cable tie are crafted from the latest UV-resistant Nylon 6/6 material, boasts a tensile strength of 22kg, ensuring durability and resistance to aging. With an active working temperature range of -25°C to 85°C, it offers excellent weather resistance and high-temperature tolerance, making it suitable for outdoor use, even in direct sunlight.

【Self-Locking & Adjustable Design】The adjustable cable tie are design for securely locks the object in place, with each pull tightening it further. It ensures easy handling while preventing any jamming, providing a reliable and efficient solution for various applications.

【Widely Used】This versatile cable tie is ideal for organizing cables, gardening, securing bicycles, and closing suitcases. Ideal for use at home, in the office, garage, during travel, or in workshops, it's an excellent choice for arranging wires, zippers, and other accessories.

【Reusable One-Way Lock】Reusable cable ties include a one-way locking mechanism that enables adjustable, reusable tightening around objects; simply pull the end through the head to achieve the desired fit.
description: Our Nylon Cable Ties are the perfect solution for organizing and securing a wide range of items, offering both strength and reliability for everyday use. Designed with versatility in mind, these cable ties can handle everything from managing cables and wires to securing items in your garden, garage, or workshop. Whether you're at home, in the office, or on the go, these durable ties provide a simple and efficient way to keep everything neat and in place. Constructed from high-quality, UV-resistant nylon, these cable ties offer excellent durability, withstanding both outdoor and indoor conditions. The strong material ensures they hold securely, even in extreme temperatures ranging from -25°C to 85°C. Whether you need to secure cables under the desk or tie down items in your outdoor storage, these ties are built to last, providing peace of mind that your belongings are safely fastened. What sets our Nylon Cable Ties apart is their unique one-way locking mechanism, allowing for easy and adjustable tightening around objects. Once the tie is pulled through the head, it tightens securely, ensuring that nothing comes loose. Plus, they are reusable, making them a cost-effective and eco-friendly solution for all your organizing needs. Simply adjust the fit and reuse them as needed—whether for home use, office organization, or travel. Ideal for a wide range of applications, from bundling cables to securing gardening tools or even closing suitcases, these cable ties provide the ultimate convenience. Their strong, reliable, and versatile design makes them the perfect addition to your organizing toolkit, allowing you to tackle any task with ease and efficiency. Choose our Nylon Cable Ties for a simple yet effective way to keep your space tidy and organized.
